deal.notes: Both closing statements are the SAME property. Buy side = FINAL (closed 11/7/2025). Sell side = ESTIMATED (closing 6/19/2026).

taxonomy._comment: The QB export taxonomy. Every closing-statement line maps to one Category + Sub. These are the dropdown options used everywhere.

taxInputs._comment: EDITABLE. Drives transfer tax, county proration, and supplemental. Verify the rate against the actual county secured bill for APN 0440-071-20.
taxInputs.transferTaxSource: CA documentary transfer tax, county base. $1.10 per $1,000. Apple Valley adds no city transfer tax. Verified: $460,000 x 1.10/1000 = $506.00, matches sell-side statement.
taxInputs.annualTaxRateSource: PLACEHOLDER 1.10% base. 92307 effective rate ~1.14% incl. bonds per assessor area. Confirm TRA rate off the actual secured bill. Tooltip shows APN 0440-071-20, San Bernardino County.
taxInputs.dayCountSource: Escrows used 30/360. Verified: $1,562.40 semi-annual / 180 x 54 days (11/7->1/1) = $468.72 exact; /180 x 12 days (6/18->6/30) = $104.16 exact.
taxInputs.priorAssessedValueNote: NEEDED for supplemental calc. If null, supplemental estimated as (purchasePrice - priorAssessedValue) x rate. Default estimate uses priorAssessedValue = 60% of purchase price if left null.
taxInputs.supplementalNote: Supplemental = (purchase price - prior assessed value) x annual rate x month-of-closing proration factor. A SECOND supplemental bill applies when the reassessment spans two fiscal years (closing in months Jan-May per the old factor table). On Ramona this is most of the profit -- workbook Summary note: 'Need Supplemental Tax EST from Tony'.

lines.label: Total Consideration / Purchase Price
lines.why: Contract purchase price. QB booked acquisition basis as $308,000 = $300,000 + $8,000 assignment, so this is the price component.

lines.label: Assignment Fee (to SPG)
lines.why: Assignment fee paid to SPG. Confirmed in QB: acquisition basis $308K = $300K price + $8K assignment.

lines.label: Kiavi Loan Proceeds
lines.why: Kiavi acquisition+rehab loan. Includes the $63K construction holdback. Loan proceeds are NOT a cost and NOT profit -- financing only. See DECISIONS.md.

lines.label: Construction Holdback (within loan)
lines.why: Portion of the $371K loan held by lender, released as rehab draws. Profit-neutral: it funds rehab, which is already a cost line. Do NOT double-count.

lines.label: Loan Interest (closing)
lines.why: Per-diem / first-period interest collected at closing.

lines.label: County Property Tax Proration
lines.why: 30/360 day-count: $1,562.40 semi-annual / 180 x 54 days (11/7->1/1) = $468.72 exact. County ad-valorem only (not supplemental).

lines.label: Origination / Service Fees
lines.why: Lender origination/service fees. Cost of money -> Interest bucket. Fill exact amount from statement.

lines.label: Documentary Transfer Tax
lines.why: $460,000 x $1.10/$1,000 = $506.00. County documentary transfer tax. AUTO-CALCULATED in the Resale section.

lines.label: Property Tax Proration (2nd half)
lines.why: Seller's share of unpaid 2nd-half (Jan-Jun) taxes prorated to COE. County ad-valorem. AUTO-CALCULATED in Resale section; verify against bill.

lines.label: Kiavi Loan Payoff
lines.why: Payoff of the same $371K Kiavi loan from the buy side. Profit-neutral (repays financing).

lines.label: Loan Interest (payoff)
lines.why: Accrued interest to payoff date -> Interest (a real holding cost).

lines.label: Pad / TC / Property-ID Fees
lines.why: Misc closing fees (transaction coordinator, property ID, pad). Settlement bucket; confirm exact line + amount.

ia._comment: FULL MASTER IA v4.1 model. Every field present. 'input' fields are editable (the old gray cells); everything else is computed live by computeIA() in index.html. Defaults below reproduce the 1834 Colorado SB example EXACTLY (Net Profit $54,042.80 / ROI 17.00% / IRR 51.43%), so you can see the rebuilt model ties out to your screenshot. Change inputs to run any deal.

_fieldNotes.overrideLoanAmt: Blank = use computed 1st loan = 90% of Cost + Repairs (= F16+B32). Enter a number to override.
_fieldNotes.buyersAgentPct: Master showed 2% in the % column but $0 in the dollar column in estimate mode (commissions only book at Final). Default 0 to match the screenshot output; this was flagged issue #8 (decorative % vs live rate).
_fieldNotes.taxFactorW23: Supplemental Tax factor. BLANK in master => supplemental = 0. Enter the county factor to activate Supplemental Tax (B38).
_fieldNotes.proratedTaxResaleRate: B47 uses 1.175%/12*months on purchase price. This is the master's resale prop-tax proration; verify against the actual bill.
